column1: Hey ella mangano, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
nicee punta cana is lit for spring break, that's where i'll be personally
how many ppl in your group so far?
word thats solid! we all from the same school?
dope which school? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
Liked “dope which school? I'll hook it up with a good group rate”
nicee we had a big group from UTampa last year, y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
pretty soon cause ik things r getting booked
yea facts things are super slim right now
I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks

just sent that over lmk if you got it!

I didnt add flights, theyre a lot cheaper to get separately on your own. but I can help you find a good flight on the side

maybe you can do just one event and spend less. its typically like $75 an event
you have time to add that onto your account though

just sent! if we end up wanting to tweak dates just lmk later

got you just making sure we still have it available
y'all still lookin to fly out of orlando?

just waiting to get a room opened up, should be quick
